description: Alerting rules for the Data Exfiltration Chain scenario (GuardDuty, VPC Flow, CloudTrail S3)

rules.name: [CloudLoadGen] Data Exfil Chain — GuardDuty Exfiltration Finding
rules.investigationGuide:
# GuardDuty Exfiltration Finding

The cloud threat detector flagged an exfiltration action — highest-fidelity signal.

## Triage
1. Identify principal: `FROM logs-aws.guardduty-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 1h AND aws.guardduty.type LIKE "Exfiltration*" | KEEP @timestamp, aws.guardduty.type, aws.guardduty.severity.value, source.ip, destination.ip | SORT @timestamp DESC`
2. Check if principal still has active sessions
3. Rotate credentials immediately if confirmed

## Escalate when
- Always page security on-call for Exfiltration findings
- Principal has access to customer-data buckets

rules.name: [CloudLoadGen] Data Exfil Chain — VPC Flow High Egress Bytes
relatedDashboards: AWS VPC Flow Logs — Traffic & Denials
rules.investigationGuide:
# VPC Flow High Egress Bytes

A single flow shipped >50 MiB outbound.

## Triage
1. Top sources: `FROM logs-aws.vpcflow-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 1h AND network.direction == "egress" AND aws.vpcflow.bytes > 52428800 | STATS bytes = SUM(aws.vpcflow.bytes) BY source.ip | SORT bytes DESC | LIMIT 25`
2. Check destination geo — foreign IPs are higher signal
3. Cross-reference with GuardDuty rule

## Escalate when
- Same source IP triggering repeatedly
- Destination on egress-deny list

rules.name: [CloudLoadGen] Data Exfil Chain — S3 GetObject With High Additional Event Count
rules.investigationGuide:
# S3 GetObject With High Additional Event Count

A principal pulled 100+ objects programmatically.

## Triage
1. Identify who and what: `FROM logs-aws.cloudtrail-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 1h AND event.action == "GetObject" AND aws.cloudtrail.additional_event_count > 100 | KEEP @timestamp, user.name, source.ip, user_agent.original, aws.cloudtrail.resources.arn | SORT aws.cloudtrail.additional_event_count DESC`
2. Is the bucket sensitive (PII, secrets, backups)?
3. Console or programmatic? Check user_agent

## Escalate when
- Bucket contains customer data or secrets
- Principal is a service account reading at unusual volume

rules.name: [CloudLoadGen] Data Exfil Chain — Full Chain Correlation
rules.investigationGuide:
# Full Chain Correlation — Data Exfiltration

**Treat as confirmed incident until proven otherwise.** Multiple exfiltration signals co-occurred.

## Triage
1. Page on-call security lead immediately
2. Correlate: `FROM logs-aws.guardduty-*, logs-aws.vpcflow-*, logs-aws.cloudtrail-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 30m | WHERE (event.dataset == "aws.guardduty" AND aws.guardduty.type LIKE "Exfiltration*") OR (event.dataset == "aws.vpcflow" AND network.direction == "egress" AND aws.vpcflow.bytes > 52428800) OR (event.dataset == "aws.cloudtrail" AND event.action == "GetObject" AND aws.cloudtrail.additional_event_count > 100) | KEEP @timestamp, event.dataset, user.name, source.ip | SORT @timestamp ASC`
3. Contain: rotate credentials, block destination IP

## Escalate when
- **Always.** This is the page-the-CISO bar.
